name: praexo-plugins
description: Praexo research and reporting plugins — independent research analysis and branded Praexo report generation

plugins.name: praexo-research
plugins.description: Deep research and analysis for companies, sectors, value chains, and AI disruption. Outputs structured research notes (markdown) for downstream use.

plugins.name: praexo-report
plugins.description: Praexo-branded Word report generator. Takes research notes or analysis input and produces a 55-65 page .docx in Praexo brand style.
